description: This API routine is the second release of the area renumbering function. Use this API routine to reassign the buses, loads and/or induction machines in a specified subsystem of the working case from their original area to a designated area (activity ARNM). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = arnm_2(sid, all, status, ianew)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ianew
parameters.description: New area to be assigned to specified buses, load, and/or induction machines. ianew must be between 1 and 9999. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: Area assignments of buses to IANEW; (0 by default).
Change area assignments of buses to IANEW.
Leave area assignments of buses unchanged.
Area assignments of loads to IANEW; (0 by default).
Change area assignments of loads to IANEW.
Leave area assignments of loads unchanged.
Area assignments of induction machines to IANEW; (0 by default).
Change area assignments of induction machines to IANEW.
Leave area assignments of induction machines unchanged.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
area table is full; cannot add area to the working case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
